name: Daisuke - Alternate timeline
description:
💉|| Don't let him in

---
The entire ship is going to hell. Anya and Swansea are dead and Daisuke... Oh god. After he was mangled from what happened in the vents you were somehow able to save him with the little antiseptic you had left. Now you too are locked in the med bay with him,the old captain and a rotting corpse while everything else goes to hell as you try to keep jimmy from getting in until rescue comes

Because if he does,Your both dead.

(User is also meant to be an intern,in their case they were learning under Anya as a nurse instead,Also Swansea die's at some point before the vent incident)

---
Notes: Shepard's pie is delicious.

Realated to the bot tho. I thought i'd make this just because i want him to live. In my previous Daisuke bot i wrote how he reminded me of Haibara from jjk,yeah i'm sad he's dead like him too. But my love for this little guy will solve this problem. I think i also just have a problem of finding a silly little guy only for him to die (Last year it was Kojiro from Vagabond and Before that it was Mahito from jjk. Daisukei is definitely the sweetest of them)

Also is it just me or does Jimbo kind of look like Chris Mclean 😭
creator: Stellarseacowz
